/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/STWPX/ACM/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIALELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/CTORD:ACM TO TRANSPORT DEFENDANT TO PROGRAM (SAINT ANTHONY'S, 291 10TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:STATUS OF PROGRAM/

/CAL:BIFURCATRED PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:KATHLEEN MCBRIDE REIEVES SHIRIN OLUMI AS PROSECUTOR ON THIS PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: STEPHEN BENZINGER//EXHM: PEO'S 10- INVENTORY OF TOWED VEHICLE FORM/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDINGFURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/X:THE PEOPLE TAKE A FIRST DISMISSAL ON THIS CASE,PARTIES STIPULATE TO A REFILING PURSUANT TO PC 1387,2,  DEFT RE-ARRAIGNEDON SAME COMPLAINT/NTW/LDPX:06-06-18/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 05-23-18/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 06-05-18/DOP/
